nasb.text: But the goat on which the lot for the scapegoat fell shall be presented alive before the Lord, to make atonement upon it, to send it into the wilderness as the scapegoat.

esv.text: but the goat on which the lot fell for Azazel shall be presented alive before the Lord to make atonement over it, that it may be sent away into the wilderness to Azazel.

cnv.text: 至於那抽籤歸阿撒瀉勒的山羊，卻要活活地擺在耶和華面前，用來贖罪，然後叫人把牠送到曠野，歸阿撒瀉勒。

ccb.text: 要将那只归阿撒泻勒的公山羊活着献给耶和华，然后把它放到旷野归阿撒泻勒，用来赎罪。
